vue/provide-inject.html.code:
<!-- App.vue (provider / ancestor) -->
<script setup>
import { provide, ref } from 'vue'
import ThemedButton from './ThemedButton.vue'

const theme = ref('light')
provide('theme', theme)
</script>

<template>
  <button @click="theme = theme === 'light' ? 'dark' : 'light'">
    Toggle theme
  </button>
  <ThemedButton />
</template>

<!-- ThemedButton.vue (deeply nested descendant) -->
<script setup>
import { inject } from 'vue'

// inject with a fallback default value
const theme = inject('theme', 'light')
</script>

<template>
  <button :class="theme">
    I am themed: {{ theme }}
  </button>
</template>

vue/template-refs.html.code:
<script setup>
import { ref, onMounted } from 'vue'

// declare a ref to hold the element reference
// the name must match the value of the ref attribute in the template
const input = ref(null)

onMounted(() => {
  // access the element imperatively after mount
  input.value.focus()
})
</script>

<template>
  <input ref="input" />
  <button @click="input.focus()">Focus the input</button>
</template>
